title: aira cupaniana
intro: Aira cupaniana, also known as Coleanthus subtilis, is a perennial herbaceous plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Aira cupaniana include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes dried and used in herbal remedies.
